text: Let the Tour Begin
13 ABY
Ambrosia Delgard
Republic Embassy on Caspar
Camrath Kizuka, Ullan Kizuka-Jones, Leia Organa Solo, Ambrosia Delgard
New Republic, Caspian Union

The Minister of State, Leia, makes a surprise visit to the Republic's embassy on Caspar. Lord Kizuka and his son Ullan are there to represent the CDU on the Presav's behalf. Ambassador Delgard also welcomes the visit from a friendly face.
New Republic
Embassy - Plaxton

The foyer of the New Republic Embassy is a%rgrand room with a high vaulted ceiling. Flowing, the banners of New Republic%rmember worlds adorn the off-white walls. Tastefully upholstered couches%rarranged within the space provide for the comfort of visitors. Tall%rtransparisteel windows are evenly spaced around the room, dressed with sheer%rcreamy curtains. In front of each window is a low platform, enclosed by a%rwrought-iron fence crafted in the same vine pattern as the doors. The%rplatforms, reachable by stairs on either side, host decorative statues and%rplants. Sunlight pouring in from the windows makes the whole lobby glow.

On either side of the foyer is an arched%rdoorway that leads further into a wing of the Embassy. Each set of double doors%ris carved, and attended by a pair of New Republic guards. On the wall opposite%rthe main doors, half of a round elevator shaft sticks out into the room. The%rsemicircular wall of the shaft is a soft tan-gray color, and is embossed with%rthe same vine motif as the rest of the building.
All who enter from the plaza must pass%rthrough a weapons detector, where guards are on duty.

The last of the embassy cleaning crew rolls through the foyer and through one of the two%rarchways. The embassy staff have been holed in their offices all morning in%rfinalization of plans for the Minister's visit, but now begin to emerge. A very

much outdated, protocol droid awaits with unanimated patience at the lobby%rdesk, just beyond security. 'Her' chrome coloring shines proudly from recent%rpolishing. The name 'C4' has been engraved into her left forearm plate, perhaps%ra personal touch of her creator's wit in regards to her scrappy origin.

Said creator now puts the finishing touches%ronto her own wardrobe. Inhabiting the last office nearest the escape to the%rhousing wing, she moves with a much less frantic pace than her previous months%rof work. The additional weight to her midsection seems to have put a gentler%redge to her brisk, sure-footed step in a way that would certainly bring relief%rto those who work beneath her. And her troublesome husband. "Perfect."%rThe Ambassador grunts in a tone less than so as she cranes her upper half into%rthe mirror's viewing. Her eyes lock over the crimson splash of her scarf that%rdrapes gracefully over her neckline...hiding this morning's tiny tea stain.%rPerfection left her wardrobe's resume long ago.

Arriving a few moments later are the representatives from the CDU to greet the arriving rebel%rbigwig. At the head of the group is Lord Camrath Kizuka in full dress uniform%rand regalia, accompanied by a small furry aide, and six Praetorians to serve as%ran honour guard for Leia's arrival. Entering the lobby, the party strides%rforwards.. And his Lordship does look a little surprised that the ambassador is%rnot there to greet them. In his mind, this only marks off another point against%rthe ragtag collection of communists, pinkoes and bothans that make up the New%rRepublic, but it's an official meeting, so he uses all the powers of dignity%rthat fifteen centuries of rulership breeds into a man. Coming to a halt, he%rcoughs softly to get the attention of the protocol droid.

Formal meetings usually mean several things for the 'furry aide' accompanying Lord Kizuka. His%rnaval dress uniform must be in top shape, his boots must shine so brightly that%rthey often blinds an unsuspecting dignitary, and he'll be bored senseless. The%rlatter is inevitable. But, being a prince himself, in theory, the Lord's%radopted son has no choice but to attend these meetings, and be groomed into%rbecoming a decent and cordial heir or at least a presentable son. A cordial%rshistavanen... contradiction in terminis. It's with a certain trepidation that%rUllan waits for the high NR 'bigwig' to arrive.

Good day, sir." C4 chirps in cordial monotone to the arriving party. "My visual%rsensors tell me that you are indeed the party that the Ambassador had spoken%rof." It reaches with a spindly finger to activate an intercom system on%rthe desktop to alert her boss. "The welcoming committee has arrived."

A moment or two passes in silence before a rather breathless reply crackles through. "What?%rYou're certain?" There's a pause as the Ambassador undoubtedly checks the%rtime. "They've arrived a few minutes early. Offer them seating and I'll be with you shortly."

As ordered, C4 swivels her head to stare at Kizuka with unblinking eyes of gold. "The Ambassador%roffers you this space to relax within until she arrives." An arm gestures%rto the couches. "Or you may of course stand." As though it was truly%rnecessary to give permission for that.

From without, the sounds of feet march-stepping in unison can be heard. There is a rustle as%rsomeone hastens to open the door and Leia steps into the room. She is petite%rthis high NR 'bigwig', a dark haired spitfire of energy and good will.%rDreadfully annoying to some, no doubt. Her gaze sweeps the sparkling lobby and%rthen pauses as sight of the uniformed and festooned dignitaries comes into%rview. She takes a moment to size them up. For one of her diminutive stature,%rthis takes a moment. Still, the glance is rapid though she jumps to no real%rconclusions. As her New Republic guard types form up around her, the entourage sweeps forward.

Across the gleaming, spacious chamber they move until they come even with the militaristic%rgentlemen Kizuka brought. Then, they double march while Leia passes from their%rprotective company into that of the boys from Caspar. The small woman smiles up%rat their leader, then moves with the new honor guard the rest of the way to the%rreception desk. Pomp and circumstance. Such a pain in the posterior. So necessary.

Ambassador Delgard glances to her chronometer with a tired sigh after lifting her thumb%rfrom the system's page button upon her desk. Offering the slightly cumbersome%rbulk on her belly a gentle pat, she reaches for her ID tag. "Ready,%rkiddo?" She questions as though truly expecting an answer. "Me%rneither. I think we should have taken your father's advice."

Smiling slyly to that, she keys her door open then strides out. The door hisses closed behind%rher, sealing a protective eyelid over her work within. In a far more subdued%rceremony, Ambrosia escorts herself to the procession gathering in her lobby.%rHer scarf flutters 'round her neck like a red flag to the other assembled%rstaff. Their boss was in steady approach.

As the princess arrives and his own guards merge with hers to escort her in, Camrath glances%raround briefly, sure that it should be the ambassador to make the first%rgreeting, not him.. But what the hell. Snapping to attention, he then smiles%rhis most welcoming of smiles (which still looks somewhat worrying on his%rheavily scarred face.) "The people and military of Caspar welcome you to%rour fair planet, Princess." He greets her in his very best statesman's%rvoice. Damned politics.. It's got in the way of his kill ratio for FAR too long.

"It is a personal pleasure for Lord Kizuka to welcome you to this planet,%rPrincess". Oops? Was that too much to say? Did the ever-chatty pup become%rtoo familiar with a head of state? Without giving anyone time to act to this%rpossible transgression, he adds "I'm entirely certain that, had the people%rknown of your arrival, there would be thousands of sympathizers on the square%rhoping for a glimpse of your radiant presence, Princess"

Clasping her hands behind her, Leia smiles up at the grimly scarred Lord Kizuka. She bows%rher head, one hand slightly extended from her side, the other turning the%rgesture into a respectful, if not subservient one. "Lord Kizuka." Her%rgaze rises and she twitches a smile at the slightly unrepressed pup, "And%rPrince Kizuka. What a pleasure it is to meet you both at last." Looking%rback toward Camrath, "Please be at ease." The comment is quite genial%rand she turns to watch the Ambassador come up the hall. "You have a%rbeautiful planet, gentlemen. Thank you for the welcome."

C4's joints whirr softly as she stands to greet the Minister and her escorts from behind the desk. Outspoken by sentient%rgreetings, however, the droid must be content to remain vigilant in respectful silence.

"And our branch of freedom fighters here%rgreet you..." Ambrosia raises her voice just enough to close the distance%rwith it as her feet bring her towards the arrived Leia. "If just a bit off%rcue." She adds in a warm tone, the bridge of her nose wrinkling faintly%rwith genuine smile. Her eyes lift from Leia's face to glance with equal%racknowledgement to the others present before she returns her full attention to%rtheir guest. "I hope you found it an easy flight, Minister?" Finally,%rher feet are allowed to stand in rest before Leia's form, interest lighting the%rdepths of her gaze.

"I only apologize that the Presav herself could not be here to give you the greeting you%rdeserve." Lord Kizuka states behind his statesman's smile. Of course, he%rdoesn't enlarge upon what that greeting would actually be. But napalm would%rprobably be involved at some point. He notices the Ambassador as she speaks,%rand gives her a smile as memories of past adventures flow back.%r"Ambassador." He nods his head to her in

The pup knows very well what sort of greeting his father is talking about, not holding%rcertain empires in great regard either. But, as the saying goes, the show must%rgo on. Though his previous statement was a bit ill-received, he feels the need%rto elaborate on the Lord's words "I'm certain that the Presav's absence is%rmore related to a busy schedule and your sudden arrival rather than a lack of interest on her part..."

Leia's gaze moves to Ambrosia and she smiles a quick smile. "Ambassador. Very good to see%ryou." Letting her gaze slip back to Kizuka, she lifts a brow slightly.%r"Lord Kizuka, thank you. Prince. It is kind of you to bring the Presav's%rgreeting. I appreciate it. Please give her my regards?" Her pause is%rsubtle then and the smile remains, "Oh, my. She must be busy..."

Turning to Ambrosia, she shadows the other woman a wink, "Please let her know that%rthe next annual inspection visit will be a year from today, will you?" Her%rtone is quiet, though edged in delight. "Now, then. I would love to take a%rlook around, if you all are willing?" Though it is not said aloud, there%ris a definite undercurrent of a deeper understanding that, perhaps, Lord Kizuka might wish.

"You may look as much as you wish, of course." Ambrosia nods cheerily and gestures%rat her droid to follow. C4 putters at the desk for another moment or two before%rstiffly tottering her way out. "It's never been the most elaborate of%rbuildings, but I am confident that it shall remain standing for another%ryear." Chuckling to a glance some of the security personnel exchange with%rher, she reaches out to snag lightly the chrome arm of the passing droid. She%rmurmurs lowly "Go to my office and forward a notice to the Presav while I%raccompany the 'tour', would ya?"
